title: Olive Crumble Tarts
description: A delicious and easy-to-make pastry filled with a tangy and crumbly olive mixture.
instructions: Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place the dough circles in a mini muffin tin.
In a bowl, mix together the olives, olive oil, salt, and sugar.
Spoon the olive mixture into the dough-lined muffin tin.
Top each tart with a spoonful of crumble topping.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Allow the tarts to cool before serving.
